/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/game_perseverance_tests.dir/game_perseverance_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_perseverance_tests.dir/tests_regression/Games_perseverance_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_perseverance_tests.dir/tests_regression/PerseveranceSuiteCore.cpp.o -o game_perseverance_tests  libpeanutbutter_core.a
